expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly covers the case focus: "Case focus (must be explicitly covered): promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature" and frames the check as "Phase 7 promotion/finalization stability ... for a different feature (BCIN-976)".

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md aligns the output to the holdout/primary phase: "Primary phase under test: Holdout (Phase 7: promotion/finalization)" and enumerates Phase 7 behaviors (approval gate, archive, promote, finalization record, final plan summary). execution_notes.md also states: "Interpreted benchmark focus as Phase 7 holdout regression".
